## Event Status Definitions

- **pending**: Scheduled but not confirmed
- **confirmed**: Verified and locked in
- **tentative**: Scheduled but needs confirmation
- **completed**: Happened, outcome recorded
- **cancelled**: Was scheduled but cancelled
- **rescheduled**: Moved to new date (with link to new CAL-ID)
- **no_show**: Scheduled but didn't happen
- **active**: Ongoing deadline/reminder
- **urgent**: Overdue or critical

## Notes

- All times in user's timezone
- Calendar entries link to structured_input.md (INBOX-XXX → CAL-XXX)
- Planning Agent queries this file for daily/weekly plans
- Intake Agent updates this file from input.txt
